# claude_environment (Resource)

A Claude Managed Agents environment: the sandbox configuration sessions run in. Environments are not versioned or updatable, so any change forces replacement. `config` is not refreshed on read.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claude_environment" "data_analysis" {
  name = "data-analysis"

  config = {
    type = "cloud"

    packages = {
      pip = ["pandas", "numpy", "scikit-learn"]
      npm = ["express"]
    }

    networking = {
      type                   = "limited"
      allowed_hosts          = ["api.example.com", "*.internal.example.com"]
      allow_mcp_servers      = true
      allow_package_managers = true
    }
  }
}

# A minimal environment with full outbound access.
resource "claude_environment" "sandbox" {
  name = "python-dev"

  config = {
    type = "cloud"
    networking = {
      type = "unrestricted"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (Attributes) Sandbox configuration. Refreshed on read; the API may enrich it with defaults, so a config that is a recursive subset of the server value is treated as unchanged. A genuine change forces replacement. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `name` (String) Unique, descriptive environment name.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) Archive timestamp (RFC 3339), or null if active.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Required:

- `type` (String) `cloud` (Anthropic-managed sandbox) or `self_hosted`.

Optional:

- `networking` (Attributes) Outbound network access for the sandbox (cloud only). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--networking))
- `packages` (Attributes) Packages to pre-install (cloud only), keyed by package manager. Versions may be pinned per that manager's syntax. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--packages))

<a id="nestedatt--config--networking"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.networking`

Required:

- `type` (String) `unrestricted` (default when networking is omitted) or `limited`.

Optional:

- `allow_mcp_servers` (Boolean) Allow outbound access to the agent's configured MCP servers (`limited` only). Defaults to false.
- `allow_package_managers` (Boolean) Allow outbound access to public package registries (`limited` only). Defaults to false.
- `allowed_hosts` (List of String) Hostnames or wildcard patterns the sandbox may reach (`limited` only). No scheme, port, or path.


<a id="nestedatt--config--packages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.packages`

Optional:

- `apt` (List of String) System packages (apt-get).
- `cargo` (List of String) Rust crates (cargo).
- `gem` (List of String) Ruby gems.
- `go` (List of String) Go modules.
- `npm` (List of String) Node.js packages (npm).
- `pip` (List of String) Python packages (pip).
